issues.hreflang_issue: hreflang en missing — fr/new-owner links fr but does not link back to /new-owner/
issues.detail: English-language hreflang pair is missing. Should have: <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://a290.wiki/new-owner/">

issues.hreflang_issue: hreflang en missing — fr/reference links fr but does not link back to /reference/
issues.detail: English-language hreflang pair is missing. Should have: <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://a290.wiki/reference/">

details.note: Two fr/ pages (new-owner, reference) are missing the hreflang='en' backlink to their English originals. All other hreflang pairs are correctly bidirectional across EN and FR versions.
